content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative single-model self-feedback loop as a primitive first-generation LLM self-reflection mechanism, and can extend it by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection research to eliminate the blind spots inherent to single-perspective self-evaluation. This creates a new multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that retains the original method’s key advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning, while boosting refinement quality.
